verses.1: The words of Agur the son of Jakeh, the revelation:
verses.2: “Surely I am the most ignorant man,
verses.4: Who has ascended up into heaven, and descended?
verses.6: Don’t you add to his words,
verses.7: “Two things I have asked of you.
verses.8: Remove far from me falsehood and lies.
verses.9: lest I be full, deny you, and say, ‘Who is the LORD?’
verses.10: “Don’t slander a servant to his master,
verses.11: There is a generation that curses their father,
verses.12: There is a generation that is pure in their own eyes,
verses.13: There is a generation, oh how lofty are their eyes!
verses.14: There is a generation whose teeth are like swords,
verses.17: “The eye that mocks at his father,
verses.18: “There are three things which are too amazing for me,
verses.19: The way of an eagle in the air,
verses.20: “So is the way of an adulterous woman:
verses.22: For a servant when he is king,
verses.23: for an unloved woman when she is married,
verses.24: “There are four things which are little on the earth,
verses.25: The ants are not a strong people,
verses.26: The hyraxes are but a feeble folk,
verses.28: You can catch a lizard with your hands,
verses.29: “There are three things which are stately in their march,
verses.30: The lion, which is mightiest among animals,
verses.32: “If you have done foolishly in lifting up yourself,
verses.33: For as the churning of milk produces butter,
